candidates.assumption_broken: All classes are known at training time.
candidates.innovation_direction: Open-set recognition for industrial partial discharge patterns
candidates.real_world_motivation: Industrial monitoring systems run for years and encounter degradation patterns that were not present in the original training data.
candidates.new_problem_formulation: Classify known discharge types while rejecting or flagging unknown types that were not seen during training.
candidates.core_technical_challenge: Separate known-class regions from open space without producing overconfident predictions on unknown inputs.
candidates.candidate_title: Open-Set Recognition for Industrial Partial Discharge Pattern Classification
